title: ASR Outdoor 8.25 Inch Rescue Knife with Belt Clip Seat Belt Cutter
description:
Don't get caught in an emergency without the ASR Outdoor Rescue Knife. This knife features an overall length of 8.25" unfolded, and the serrated blade is about 3.5" in length. The knife itself has a belt clip on the silver-colored handle. It can easily be opened with the simple push of your thumb. This emergency knife also comes with a seat belt cutter and window punch in case of an auto emergency. Make sure to keep one of these in your pocket, backpack, bug out bag or vehicle in case of an emergency!
